message:
Tighten null checks in ecosystem detection and agent parsing

Two code quality improvements:

Ecosystem detection:
- Change from != null to !== undefined && !== null for CLI summary
  property assignments to be explicit about both undefined and null

Agent mail snapshot:
- Replace early continue with if-block for snapshot assignment
- Clearer intent and easier to add logging if needed

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
